name: kubectl
description: kubectl is the official command-line tool for interacting with Kubernetes clusters. Shep uses kubectl to configure access to provisioned clusters and to run health checks. Usually bundled with k3d, but installing it directly is recommended.
author: Kubernetes Authors

commands.linux: curl -LO "https://dl.k8s.io/release/$(curl -L -s https://dl.k8s.io/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" && sudo install -o root -g root -m 0755 kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl && rm kubectl
